description: Version-state canonicalization vectors (ADR-036, spec/semver-trust.md §8.1). Each carries a carried-forward version-state object and the semver-trust-version-state-json v0.2 digest an emitter MUST produce and a verifier MUST reproduce: RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) over the object, hashed with SHA-256. The 'expected.digest' is the digestSet bound as a release/v0.2 stateIdentity 'digest'; 'inputs.state.predecessor_state_digest' is the sha256:<hex> string form of the parent state's digest — the tamper-evident hash-chain link.

vectors.description: A new version line at genesis (advance): no baseline and a null predecessor-state digest. Establishes the chain head every recurring release extends.

A recurring advance whose predecessor_state_digest is the genesis vector's digest, exercising the hash-chain link and the non-null baseline (immutable lineage tag with raw/peeled OIDs and source identity).
